summary: Iteration 2 - tested 13 new POS features (custom GST, software name, bill search/date filter, customer search, balance mgmt with WhatsApp reminder, Excel export, reports date range, theme toggle, mobile responsive). Found and FIXED a critical backend bug where Customer Pydantic model was missing the `balance` field. Also added missing `search` query param to GET /api/customers. After fix, all 12 new feature backend tests pass (100%) and frontend flows verified end-to-end including mobile drawer.

minor.issue: FIXED by testing agent — Customer model lacked `balance: float = 0.0` field; due to `extra='ignore'`, all `Customer(balance=...)` calls dropped balance silently for new customers, and `response_model=List[Customer]` stripped balance from /api/customers and /api/customers/balance responses. Pay-balance returned new_balance=0 for new customers.
FIXED — Was missing `search` query parameter though frontend sends it. Added regex search on name/phone.

action_items: Pre-seeded 24 products got reduced to 5 products in DB (existing data was deleted between iterations); main agent may want to re-seed by manually clearing collection and POST /api/seed if 24 products are required. Not a code bug.
Stock can go negative on checkout (no validation) — existing issue from iteration 1, still present.
Reports query mixes timezone-aware vs naive ISO strings ($gte comparison) — works because all created_at strings are timezone-aware ISO; fragile if any code writes naive datetimes.
critical_code_review_comments: BillingPOS.jsx is ~1640 lines — should be split into POS / Inventory / Bills / Customers / Balance / Reports / Settings sub-components for maintainability.
server.py still uses deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown'); migrate to FastAPI lifespan handlers.
POST /api/customers/{phone}/pay-balance accepts `amount` as a query param (not body) — unusual; consider JSON body with Pydantic validation.
No backend validation prevents negative `balance_amount` or balance_amount > total when creating bills (frontend enforces, backend trusts).

Initial useEffect sets software_name from default state ('POS System'); the loadData() then overrides — brief flash of default value on every reload. Consider showing a loader or default to empty string.
Theme attribute set twice in useEffects (lines 78 and 106) — first one is redundant since second runs on mount too.
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (added Customer.balance field; added `search` param to GET /api/customers)

success_rate.backend: 100% (12/12 on new features after fix; 13/16 on iteration_1 tests — 3 failures only due to seed data being reduced from 24 to 5 products, unrelated to code)

seed_data_creation: Tests created TEST_ prefixed customers/bills with balances; some remain in DB. No cleanup needed for these.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 added `balance: float = 0.0` to Customer model in server.py — this was the root cause of customer balance not surfacing. Also added search param to GET /api/customers. All v2 features verified end-to-end. Frontend BillingPOS.jsx briefly shows 'POS System' default on reload before async settings fetch completes — test must wait ~500ms before checking .logo text. Mobile drawer works (tested at 390x844). Theme toggle persists via localStorage.
rca_of_the_issue: Customer Pydantic model was created with name/phone/total_purchases/visit_count/created_at but `balance` was never declared. Because Customer uses `ConfigDict(extra='ignore')`, the kwarg `balance=bill.balance_amount` in /api/bills handler (line 280) was silently discarded — new customers were inserted into MongoDB without the balance field. Existing customers got balance updated via `$set` raw operation (line 271), so balance was present in MongoDB but stripped from API responses by `response_model=List[Customer]`. Fix: added `balance: float = 0.0` to Customer model. After fix, /api/customers/balance correctly returns customers with outstanding balance, and pay-balance correctly decrements.
